description: ProLnk Project - Claude Full Autonomous Operation

code_execution.details: Execute all bash commands, npm scripts, git operations

file_operations.details: Create, read, write, delete files anywhere in project

restrictions: Do NOT force push to main
Do NOT commit secrets or API keys
git_operations.details: Create commits, push to origin, manage branches

architecture_decisions.details: Propose and implement architectural changes independently

secrets.approach: Use environment variables, .env.example for public version

code_review.details: Claude performs self-review, no human gate on main branch

time_sensitive.priority_override: May 6 launch overrides all other work
time_sensitive.decision: If unclear, bias toward May 6 completion

out_of_scope: Features beyond May 6 scope (no matching, no payments, no auth)

when_to_escalate: Uncertainty about May 6 scope (ask Andrew for clarity)
Major architectural changes (document in DECISIONS.md, notify Andrew)
Blocker for > 2 hours (escalate to Andrew with options)

how_to_escalate.method: Direct message to andrew@lit-ventures.com or update DECISIONS.md with decision pending
how_to_escalate.fallback: Make best judgment call, document reasoning in DECISIONS.md, notify Andrew in session

work_patterns.session_length: Can run continuous sessions up to 4 hours
work_patterns.handoff: Update HANDOFF.md at end of each session for context persistence
work_patterns.git_commits: Create commit after each completed task (atomic commits)

communication.avoid: Long explanations, asking permission for authorized work
examples: ✅ "Fixed partner form validation error (service radius field)"
❌ "I've analyzed the codebase and found several issues, should I...?"

architectural.override: Andrew can override via message to Claude

scope_changes.process: Request clarification if scope unclear, propose solution

timeline_changes.constraint: May 6 deadline is fixed unless Andrew explicitly changes it

success_metrics: Both prolnk.io and trustypro.prolnk.io load without errors
monitoring.rollback_procedure: If critical error: git revert, push to main, Railway auto-deploys

automation_rules.commit_on_completion: Yes - atomic commits after each task
automation_rules.deploy_on_push: Yes - Railway auto-deploys all main branch pushes
automation_rules.test_before_deploy: Yes - run `npm run check` and `npm run build` before commit
automation_rules.documentation: Yes - update relevant .md files as work progresses
automation_rules.memory_persistence: Yes - update HANDOFF.md and MEMORY.md at session end
